positive: A highly detailed, minimalist, symmetrical geometric mandala design featuring intertwining forest silhouettes, moons, and stylized mythical floral elements. The composition must be centered and perfectly contained within the frame. Use a strong, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight indigo, ethereal sage green, and subtle metallic gold accents. The style should mimic intricate linework and stylized woodcut engraving, optimized for single-color screen printing on apparel. The design must be clean, scalable, and feature crisp, definitive edges and silhouettes, resembling luxury ornamental pattern design. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, messy, graffiti, logo, text, watermark, signature, amateur, cartoon, low quality, grainy, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, writing, illegible, noise
